## What changed

Describe the main change introduced in this PR. Be specific about the files
or behavior that were modified. Avoid vague summaries and help the reviewer
understand the scope without reading the full diff.

## Why

Explain the problem this PR solves and why this approach was chosen.
Include context, tradeoffs considered, and any constraints that affected
the design decision.

## How to test

Provide exact steps to verify the change on a clean machine.

Example:
1. Activate the virtual environment
2. Install dependencies
3. Run: pytest tests/
4. Confirm all tests pass and expected behavior matches the description

## Checklist

- [ ] Title is specific and written in imperative mood
- [ ] This PR contains one logical change only
- [ ] Tests were added or updated if needed
- [ ] README updated if behavior changed
- [ ] No debug prints or temporary code left in
